metadata.description: btx_lib_mail delivered as a single Claude Code plugin: a skill to install and use btx_lib_mail (send email from Python or the shell, with streamed large attachments, RFC 3030 BDAT, STARTTLS, and attachment security).

plugins.name: btx_lib_mail
plugins.description: Install and use btx_lib_mail: send email from Python or the shell, stream large attachments without buffering them in memory, RFC 3030 BDAT/CHUNKING, STARTTLS with auth, multi-host failover, and attachment security. Runnable zero-install via uvx.
